'''kopathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:foe|foe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foe|foe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kopathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kopathithi|kopathithi]] || [[word:kopathiji|kopathiji]] || [[word:kopathishi|kopathishi]] || [[word:kopathiki|kopathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kopathuthuthu|kopathuthuthu]] || [[word:kopathujuju|kopathujuju]] || [[word:kopathushushu|kopathushushu]] || [[word:kopathukuku|kopathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kopathuthu|kopathuthu]] || [[word:kopathuju|kopathuju]] || [[word:kopathushu|kopathushu]] || [[word:kopathuku|kopathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kopathufthuf|kopathufthuf]] || [[word:kopathufjuf|kopathufjuf]] || [[word:kopathufshuf|kopathufshuf]] || [[word:kopathufkuf|kopathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kopathethe|kopathethe]] || [[word:kopatheje|kopatheje]] || [[word:kopatheshe|kopatheshe]] || [[word:kopatheke|kopatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kopathothotho|kopathothotho]] || [[word:kopathojojo|kopathojojo]] || [[word:kopathoshosho|kopathoshosho]] || [[word:kopathokoko|kopathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kopathotho|kopathotho]] || [[word:kopathojo|kopathojo]] || [[word:kopathosho|kopathosho]] || [[word:kopathoko|kopathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kopathofthof|kopathofthof]] || [[word:kopathofjof|kopathofjof]] || [[word:kopathofshof|kopathofshof]] || [[word:kopathofkof|kopathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfthĂŻf|kopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfjĂŻf|kopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfshĂŻf|kopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfkĂŻf|kopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kopathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kopathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kopathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kopathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfthĂŻf|kopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfjĂŻf|kopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfshĂŻf|kopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfkĂŻf|kopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfthĂŻf|kopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfjĂŻf|kopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfshĂŻf|kopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kopathĂŻfkĂŻf|kopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kopathĂŠthĂŠ|kopathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kopathĂŠjĂŠ|kopathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kopathĂŠshĂŠ|kopathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kopathĂŠkĂŠ|kopathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kopathathatha|kopathathatha]] || [[word:kopathajaja|kopathajaja]] || [[word:kopathashasha|kopathashasha]] || [[word:kopathakaka|kopathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kopathatha|kopathatha]] || [[word:kopathaja|kopathaja]] || [[word:kopathasha|kopathasha]] || [[word:kopathaka|kopathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kopathafthaf|kopathafthaf]] || [[word:kopathafjaf|kopathafjaf]] || [[word:kopathafshaf|kopathafshaf]] || [[word:kopathafkaf|kopathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kopathasha|kopathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kopathshĂ«sha|kopathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kopathrosha|kopathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kopathmusha|kopathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kopathyasha|kopathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokopathnkshĂ«sha|gokopathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokopathnkrosha|gokopathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokopathnkmusha|gokopathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokopathnkyasha|gokopathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kopapathasha|kopapathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kopapathshĂ«sha|kopapathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kopapathrosha|kopapathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kopapathmusha|kopapathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kopapathyasha|kopapathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokopapathnkshĂ«sha|gokopapathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokopapathnkrosha|gokopapathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokopapathnkmusha|gokopapathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokopapathnkyasha|gokopapathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kepĂŠthasha|kepĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kepĂŠthshĂ«sha|kepĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kepĂŠthrosha|kepĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kepĂŠthmusha|kepĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kepĂŠthyasha|kepĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokepĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gokepĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokepĂŠthnkrosha|gokepĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokepĂŠthnkmusha|gokepĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokepĂŠthnkyasha|gokepĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kopfathasha|kopfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kopfathshĂ«sha|kopfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kopfathrosha|kopfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kopfathmusha|kopfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kopfathyasha|kopfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokopfathnkshĂ«sha|gokopfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokopfathnkrosha|gokopfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokopfathnkmusha|gokopfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokopfathnkyasha|gokopfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
